records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's been bothering me for a while now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's been bothering me for a while now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's been bothering me for a while now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But those things extending between the structures... Those are trees, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But those things extending between the structures... Those are trees, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But those things extending between the structures... Those are trees, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're plants. But they're all withered up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're plants. But they're all withered up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're plants. But they're all withered up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you seen specimens like this in the Counterside before, Captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you seen specimens like this in the Counterside before, Captain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you seen specimens like this in the Counterside before, Captain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen fossils, but this is inside a man-made facility. It's not old enough for fossils to have formed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen fossils, but this is inside a man-made facility. It's not old enough for fossils to have formed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen fossils, but this is inside a man-made facility. It's not old enough for fossils to have formed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem pretty calm about this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem pretty calm about this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem pretty calm about this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Counterside itself is a place where common sense goes out the window.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Counterside itself is a place where common sense goes out the window.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Counterside itself is a place where common sense goes out the window.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to understand everything will only give you a headache.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to understand everything will only give you a headache.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to understand everything will only give you a headache.

records.m_Talk_ENG: True. As long as those things don't suddenly attack me, they don't bother me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: True. As long as those things don't suddenly attack me, they don't bother me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: True. As long as those things don't suddenly attack me, they don't bother me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you installing the distortion filter right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you installing the distortion filter right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you installing the distortion filter right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, this will block their sensory organs. They'll be sleeping like babies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, this will block their sensory organs. They'll be sleeping like babies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, this will block their sensory organs. They'll be sleeping like babies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> that Reaper Industries recently developed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> that Reaper Industries recently developed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> that Reaper Industries recently developed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All those bastards did was apply the technology that had been leaked onto the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All those bastards did was apply the technology that had been leaked onto the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All those bastards did was apply the technology that had been leaked onto the Dark Network.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's how ideas work. How could anyone run a business based solely on their own ideas?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's how ideas work. How could anyone run a business based solely on their own ideas?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's how ideas work. How could anyone run a business based solely on their own ideas?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hear what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hear what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hear what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did the light turn on by itself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did the light turn on by itself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did the light turn on by itself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An alarm must've gone off as soon as it got power. What on earth did that idiot Giallo touch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An alarm must've gone off as soon as it got power. What on earth did that idiot Giallo touch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An alarm must've gone off as soon as it got power. What on earth did that idiot Giallo touch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s are waking up! We have to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s are waking up! We have to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s are waking up! We have to get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible. This is a straight corridor, they'll come at us from both sides.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible. This is a straight corridor, they'll come at us from both sides.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible. This is a straight corridor, they'll come at us from both sides.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Now what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Now what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Now what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay calm and cover me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay calm and cover me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay calm and cover me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They won't target us as soon as the cradle's activated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They won't target us as soon as the cradle's activated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They won't target us as soon as the cradle's activated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's do this!
